steps.title: Identify the key logical signal
steps.content: The passage states that kestrels' surroundings significantly affect their hormone levels, then uses “Therefore” to signal an expected finding. The blank should report a difference in hormone levels between wild and captive kestrels.

steps.title: Match the answer to the prediction
steps.content:
Choice D reports higher androgen hormone levels in wild males than in captive males during breeding season.
  • A compares different species
  • B claims similarity instead of difference
  • C addresses individual variation rather than setting effects
. This matches choice D — D is correct.
